title: Cash Flow Stabilization
description: Increase liquid cash reserves and reduce short-term financial pressure across credit and operating accounts.
goal: Increase liquid cash from $1,352 to $5,000 while reducing credit utilization
notes: Current liquid cash: $1,352. Credit exposure: $29,596. Chase Freedom Unlimited ($19,372) is the dominant liability at 65% of total debt. Capital One Quicksilver ($8,863) accounts for another 30%.
